◎简　　介  

　　When two CSA agents assassinate their mentors but don't remember the killings, master puzzle-solver Cathy Davis (Lea Thompson, Doubting Thomas), a.k.a. Jane Doe, is called in to find out why. What she soon uncovers is a secret government experiment in mind control that's being used to silence those who know too much. In a desperate race against the clock, Cathy must reveal who ...
